name: Salmon for Supper
recipeIngredient: 1 Large russet potato, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash salmon and pat dry.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan with vermouth; stir in orange peel, lemon juice, vegetable seasoning, garlic, onion, and parsley.
3. Place salmon in a baking dish. Brush each side of the fish with the butter mixture.
4. Lay potato slices on top of the fish.
5. Wrap the baking dish tightly in foil, sealing all edges.
6. Grill or bake:
- Over barbecue coals for 10-15 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily.
- In an oven preheated to 325°F, covered, until the fish flakes easily.
